title: Senior Software Engineer, Core
description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages.
* 3 years of experience testing, maintaining, or launching software products, and 1 year of experience with software design and architecture.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical field.
* 5 years of experience with data structures/algorithms.
* 1 year of experience in a technical leadership role.
* Experience developing accessible technologies.


**About The Job**
 Google's software engineers develop the next\\-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large\\-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast\\-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full\\-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
   

  

 With your technical expertise you will manage project priorities, deadlines, and deliverables. You will design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and enhance software solutions.
   

  

 The Core team builds the technical foundation behind Google’s flagship products. We are owners and advocates for the underlying design elements, developer platforms, product components, and infrastructure at Google. These are the essential building blocks for excellent, safe, and coherent experiences for our users and drive the pace of innovation for every developer. We look across Google’s products to build central solutions, break down technical barriers and strengthen existing systems. As the Core team, we have a mandate and a unique opportunity to impact important technical decisions across the company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Write and test product or system development code.
* Participate in, or lead design reviews with peers and stakeholders to decide amongst available technologies.
* Review code developed by other developers and provide feedback to ensure best practices (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).
* Contribute to existing documentation or educational content and adapt content based on product/program updates and user feedback.
* Triage product or system issues and debug/track/resolve by analyzing the sources of issues and the impact on hardware, network, or service operations and quality.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Senior Software Engineer (Java/ Golang)
description:

 Besides its SaaS business, Circles operates three other distinct businesses:
   

  

* Circles.Life: A wholly\\-owned digital lifestyle telco brand based in Singapore, Circles.Life is powered by Circles’ SaaS platform and pioneering go\\-to\\-market strategies. It is the digital market leader in Singapore and has won numerous awards for marketing, customer service, and innovative product offerings beyond connectivity.
* Circles Aspire: A global provider of Communications Platform\\-as\\-a\\-Service (CPaaS) solutions. Its cloud\\-based Experience Cloud platform enables enterprises, service providers and developers to deliver and scale mobile, messaging, IoT, and connectivity services worldwide.
* Jetpac: Specializing in travel tech solutions, Jetpac provides seamless eSIM roaming for over 200 destinations and innovative travel lifestyle products, redefining connectivity for digital travelers. Jetpac was awarded Travel eSIM of the Year.

title: Product Developer
description:

**Position Purpose**
 The Associate Product Developer role is part of the TTEC Digital Experience Innovation team, supporting DevOps initiatives across multiple cloud environments. This position serves as a DevOps subject matter expert contributing to new implementations, upgrades, and cloud\\-based platform solutions. The role focuses on networking, security, monitoring, alerting, deployment automation, and cloud cost optimization across hybrid and multi\\-cloud environments.
   

  

 This position provides exposure to Networking \\& Network Security and major cloud platforms including
 **Amazon Web Services** 
 ,
 **Google Cloud Platform** 
 , and
 **Microsoft Azure** 
 .
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Diagnose and resolve network connectivity issues across hybrid environments (on\\-prem to cloud and cloud to cloud).
   

  

**Configure And Troubleshoot**
 VPNs (Site\\-to\\-Site, IPSec, SSL)
   

  

 VPC networking (subnets, routes, NAT, gateways)
   

  

 VPC Peering, Private Service Connect, Private Endpoints
   

  

 Load Balancers (L4/L7\\) and DNS
   

  

 Implement and validate firewall rules, ACLs, security groups, NSGs, and Zero Trust controls.
   

  

 Perform packet analysis and traffic tracing using tcpdump, Wireshark, Cloud Trace, and VPC Flow Logs.

**Improve Network Security Posture Using**
 Cloud Armor / AWS WAF / Azure Firewall

 Willingness to work in Shift B/C as required.
   

  

**Technical Expertise**
 Strong understanding of TCP/IP, routing, NAT, DNS, VPNs, subnetting, and security rules.
   

  

 Hands\\-on experience in at least one cloud platform (
 **Google Cloud Platform** 
 preferred).
   

  

 Experience troubleshooting hybrid cloud network environments end\\-to\\-end.
   

  

 Experience with firewall configurations and Zero Trust network flows.

Our technology stack reflects our views of using the best tools for the job, employing Salesforce, Veeva, along with Mulesoft, MySQL, MongoDB, high\\-performance computing clusters (HPC), and a variety of AWS services to analyze and disseminate vast volumes of genomic data.

* You will implement Salesforce dev, design, architecture and DevOps best practices while being hands\\-on technical leader guiding, coaching and mentoring Junior developers and Technical Leads

* Experience with Salesforce Architecture, design, integrations patterns, release Management, ongoing maintenance and Salesforce best practices
* Hands\\-on technical leader with ability to contribute even at story level solutioning, ability to review code, design and architecture
* Experience managing cross functional stakeholder management for IT and business stakeholders
* Experience in design and implementation of Sales/Service/Health/Experience Cloud enterprise solutions
* Strong knowledge of Salesforce.com architecture components \\- Sales/Service and/or Health Cloud.
* Familiarity with various integration patterns and experience building highly scalable integrations with various systems using Mulesoft or other middleware technologies
* Experience in implementation of Apex, Lighting Framework, Lightning Components, Lightning App Builder, Lightning Design System.
* Experience with Veeva implementation or familiarity with Veeva suite of products highly desirable

**What We Can Do For You**

title: Staff Emulation Engineer
description:
**The Future of AI is Built on Arm**
 Arm powers the compute foundation of modern life, with more than 350 billion Arm\\-based chips shipped to date. The world’s most innovative companies, including AWS, Microsoft, Google, Meta, NVIDIA, and Samsung, build on Arm to meet the growing compute demand that drives the AI era. From milliwatts in the smallest edge devices to megawatts in the world’s largest data centers, Arm achieves the impossible by enabling intelligent experiences that shape the future for everyone.
   

  

****IN THIS ROLE, YOU WILL****
 You will own and evolve Arm’s
 **emulation** 
 environments for next\\-generation processors and SoCs, ensuring they are scalable, performant, and aligned with the needs of both hardware and software teams.
   

  

 You will drive the adoption of robust emulation methodologies across programs—enabling earlier software bring\\-up, faster system validation, and improved developer productivity. By working across architecture, design, verification, and software teams, you will help ensure that emulation is not just a tool, but a strategic enabler for delivering complete system solutions.
   

  

 Your ownership of workflows, infrastructure, and debug strategies will improve how emulation is deployed and used across Arm, increasing reliability, throughput, and time\\-to\\-insight for complex system\\-level problems.
   

  

 You will also play a key role in shaping how we collaborate with EDA partners—driving tool improvements, influencing roadmaps, and ensuring Arm remains at the forefront of emulation capability.
   

  

**Required Skills \\& Experience**
* A degree or equivalent practical experience in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science,
* Proven experience (8\\+ years) working with emulation platforms such as ZeBu, Palladium, or Strato
* Strong understanding of emulation, verification, and system\\-level debug methodologies
* Experience compiling, running, and debugging large\\-scale SoC designs
* Proven knowledge of RTL design (SystemVerilog/Verilog) and UVM\\-based environments
* Strong scripting skills (Python, Perl, or similar) for automation and workflow optimization
* Ability to independently drive complex technical problems to resolution
* Strong collaboration and communication skills in a global engineering environment


****Desirable Skills****
* Deep experience debugging complex emulation failures (runtime issues, crashes, or mismatches)
* Experience working directly with EDA vendors to triage issues and drive root\\-cause resolution
* Familiarity with shared compute environments, job scheduling, and resource management
* Experience in SoC bring\\-up and hardware/software co\\-validation
* Exposure to hybrid emulation/simulation workflows and performance modeling
* Experience optimizing throughput and performance in large\\-scale emulation systems.


 Our
 **10x mindset** 
 guides how we engineer, collaborate, and grow. Understand what it means and how to reflect 10x in your work: https://careers.arm.com/en/10x\\-mindset
   

  

****Accommodations at Arm****
 At Arm, we want to build extraordinary teams. If you need an adjustment or an accommodation during the recruitment process, please email accommodations@arm.com . To note, by sending us the requested information, you consent to its use by Arm to arrange for appropriate accommodations. All accommodation or adjustment requests will be treated with confidentiality, and information concerning these requests will only be disclosed as necessary to provide the accommodation. Although this is not an exhaustive list, examples of support include breaks between interviews, having documents read aloud, or office accessibility. Please email us about anything we can do to accommodate you during the recruitment process.
   

  

****Hybrid Working at Arm****
 Arm’s approach to hybrid working is designed to create a working environment that supports both high performance and personal wellbeing. We believe in bringing people together face to face to enable us to work at pace, whilst recognizing the value of flexibility. Within that framework, we empower groups/teams to determine their own hybrid working patterns, depending on the work and the team’s needs. Details of what this means for each role will be shared upon application. In some cases, the flexibility we can offer is limited by local legal, regulatory, tax, or other considerations, and where this is the case, we will collaborate with you to find the best solution. Please talk to us to find out more about what this could look like for you.
   

  

****Equal Opportunities at Arm****
 Arm is an equal opportunity employer, committed to providing an environment of mutual respect where equal opportunities are available to all applicants and colleagues. We are a diverse organization of dedicated and innovative individuals, and don’t discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran.

 The CP4BA Technical Lead will drive delivery and operations for Canada Life’s Enterprise Content Management platform, built on IBM Cloud Pak for Business Automation (CP4BA) and hosted on AWS using ROSA (Red Hat OpenShift Service on AWS), EC2 compute, DB2, and various automation components.
   

  

 This role is accountable for the end\\-to\\-end ownership of ECM platform solutions—from architecture and design through development, deployment, support, and optimization. The ideal candidate is an allrounder who can operate as a Developer, Business Systems Analyst, Architect, Mentor, and Development Lead, ensuring the ECM platform is reliable, scalable, secure, and delivering business value.
   

  

 The Technical Lead partners closely with business stakeholders, architects, cloud engineering, and product owners to evolve and modernize CP4BA capabilities. Success is measured by platform stability, development excellence, and the ability to deliver high quality automation and content solutions that align with enterprise priorities.
   

  

 The role requires strong technical depth, exceptional analytical and problem solving capabilities, and proven leadership in fast paced, cloud\\-based environments.
   

  

**Essential Functions**
* Technical Leadership \\& Ownership
* Own the end\\-to\\-end technical design, development, deployment, and support of ECM/CP4BA solutions across Workflow, Business Automation Studio, Content Navigator, FileNet, and related components.
* Design and implement scalable solutions leveraging ROSA (OpenShift), AWS services, EC2 compute patterns, DB2 data structures, and containerized workloads.
* Translate business requirements into solution architectures, technical specifications, and development plans, acting as both architect and lead developer.
* Lead platform upgrades, patching, automation improvements, and environment stabilization efforts.
* Create, maintain, and optimize workflows, content models, document lifecycle rules, automation scripts, integrations, and APIs using CP4BA and FileNet capabilities.
* Oversee DevOps pipelines, GitOps processes, CI/CD tooling, and operational automation for ROSA/OpenShift deployments.
* Perform hands\\-on troubleshooting for platform issues across application, infrastructure, and integration layers.
* Ensure high\\-quality, reusable, performant code and strong engineering discipline.
* Guide solution decisions and advise product owners, architects, and senior leaders on technical feasibility, risk, and strategic direction.
* Stay current on CP4BA, OpenShift, AWS, and ECM industry best practices; introduce modernization opportunities including AI/GenAI enhancements.
* Leadership \\& Delivery Management
* Serve as the primary offshore leadership point of contact for onshore engineering, product, QA, and architecture teams.
* Ensure seamless daily handoffs across time zones with clear communication, documentation, and progress updates.
* Manage team allocation, sprint planning, workload distribution, and release readiness.
* Provide proactive delivery oversight, addressing blockers, risks, dependencies, and escalations early.
* Maintain strong alignment with business priorities, release timelines, security/compliance requirements, and operational SLAs.
* Lead, mentor, and coach a team of developers and analysts, fostering a culture of technical excellence, collaboration, and continuous learning.
* Conduct code reviews, enforce engineering best practices, and ensure adherence to architectural standards.
* Collaborate with product managers, business partners, and enterprise architects to define scope, timelines, and priorities.
* Communicate technical concepts and project status clearly and effectively with business and technical stakeholders.
* Champion continuous improvement, innovation, and knowledge sharing across the ECM and automation teams.
* Support operational excellence through incident management, root cause analysis, and prevention strategies.
* Build strong relationships across technology teams (cloud, security, data, infra) to ensure stable, compliant, and optimized service delivery.


**Education**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science.
* Agile and waterfall project delivery is an asset.


**Experience**
* 6–10\\+ years of experience in enterprise technology roles including development, analysis, design, and solution delivery.
* Excellent communicator with strong cross\\-cultural, crosslocation collaboration skills.
* Ability to translate complex technical topics into clear, actionable guidance for teams and stakeholders.
* Strong decision\\-making and problem\\-solving skills with a focus on quality and outcomes.
* Ability to manage ambiguity, adjust to shifting priorities, and drive clarity
* Demonstrated ability to act as Developer, Architect, BSA, and Lead simultaneously in complex ecosystems.
* Strong leadership and mentoring skills with experience growing technical teams.
* Ability to influence, collaborate, and partner across multiple groups and seniority levels.
* Exceptional communication skills across technical and non\\-technical audiences.
* Comfort with ambiguity, shifting priorities, and fast\\-paced delivery.
* Experience driving operational improvements, challenging the status quo, and leading cultural change.
* Strategic mindset with hands\\-on execution skills—able to dive deep and also guide the bigger picture.


**Skills/characteristics**
 Technical Expertise
   

  

* Strong hands\\-on expertise with IBM CP4BA / FileNet / IBM Business Automation Workflow (BAW) including workflows, content services, applications, document lifecycle management, and automation design.
* Experience deploying and supporting CP4BA workloads on AWS, ideally using: ROSA (OpenShift), EC2, DB2
* Cloud\\-native logging, monitoring, and scaling patterns
* Solid development background—Java, REST APIs, scripting, automation tools, containerized applications.
* Experience as a Tech Lead or Senior Developer guiding complex solution delivery.
* Familiarity with CI/CD (GitHub, GitLab, Jenkins or similar) and DevOps/Agile practices.
* Strong understanding of security, compliance, and platform resilience in enterprise environments.
